# Malformed examples

[] [SUP]
Description after an empty subject.

[Widgets Inc] []
Description after an empty category.

[Widgets Inc] SUP]
Missing opening category bracket.

[Widgets Inc] [SUP
Missing closing category bracket.

[Widgets Inc [SUP]
Mismatched brackets.

[Widgets Inc] [SUP] trailing
Trailing header text.

[Valid] [DEV]
This valid entry precedes a malformed later entry.

[Later] DEV]
Malformed later entry.
